chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No. 308 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application. 09-03-2023 Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Turk, Advocate a/w applicants. Mr. Faheem Ahmed Panhwar, Addl.P.G. ============= Omar Sial, J: Applicants are all accused in F.I.R. No. 02 of 2023 registered under sections 324, 147, 148, 149, 337-A(i), 337-A(ii), 337-A(iii), 337-A(iv), 337-F(i), 337-L(ii), 504 and 506/2 P.P.C. at the Makli police station. In this incident Irshad Ali, Mohammad Jumman and his son Ghulam Murtaza were injured. The injured and complainant are present in court and submit that they have patched up their differences and that the injured have forgiven the applicants. Learned counsel submits that applications to record the compromise will be filed before the learned trial court shortly. In view of the foregoing the learned Addl.P.G. has no objection if the pre-arrest bail granted earlier is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Order accordingly. JUDGE
